style.styleSentence: A mid-tempo (96 BPM) F-minor track blending gritty trap drums with atmospheric synth pads and warm basslines that build from a brooding void into an explosive, brass-heavy climax where the vocal delivery shifts between Spanish melodic hooks and aggressive English verses about turning struggle into gold.
style.vocalStyle: Dynamic flow switching between introspective whispering in low registers to powerful, chest-voice belting during the chorus

sections.raw: Intro - Female Spoken, Low And Serious
sections.text:
Mm.
Este verano se siente diferente.
Pero esto no es vacaciones.
Esto es presión.
Esto es fuego.
Esto es cuando el vacío aprende mi nombre.

¡Construye!
¡Sube!
Pressure make gold!
La presión hace oro!

Ay ya ya
Estamos afuera now
Ay ya ya
Feet on the ground
Ay ya ya
Let the bass roll low
Del vacío hasta el oro

I had too much weight sitting heavy on my shoulders
Demasiadas noches frías, too many dreams getting older
Same walls, same clock, same fight with time
Same voice in the dark saying “you ain’t gon’ shine”
Pero el tambor sonó like a war call
Brass hit hard, made the whole block talk
One deep breath, then I stood up tall
Had to stop waiting, had to take it all
Laptop closed but the soul still loading
Hands still dirty but the heart still golden
I was down in the void where the lights don’t show
Now I beat on the dark till the whole thing glow

Yo no estaba roto
Me estaban formando
Yo no estaba muerto
Me estaban quemando

Suelta el miedo
Llena el pecho con fire
Step through the noise
Climb a little higher
No shame in the scars
No fear in the climb
Si el mundo grita duro
I’ma turn it into mine

Venimos del void
Now we turn it into gold
Oro en el pecho
Gold in the soul
Built from the pressure
Raised by the cold
Venimos del void
Now we turn it into gold

¡Oro!
But we aiming past gold!
¡Oro!
Que lo sepa todo el mundo!

Oh-oh, déjalo arder
Oh-oh, déjalo ver
Oh-oh, mírame crecer
Venimos del void
Now we turn it into gold

Mente clara
Heart bold
Manos arriba
Still gold
New me
Still loading
Alma limpia
Still glowing

De Queens to the island, de la isla to the sky
Boricua y Quisqueya, fuego in my eyes
Plátano, perico ripiao, drums in the street
808 under my chest, brass under my feet
No more waiting on permission
No more begging for a lane
No more hiding all the vision
No more making joy feel shame
They laughed when the tools came out
Said it ain’t real when the new wave sprout
But I built with the sparks, built with the scars
Built with the bass and I aimed at stars
Tú tiras sombra, yo la vuelvo sol
Tú tiras piedra, yo construyo control
You can call it fake, I call it free
I came from the void, now the gold is me

No necesito tu corona
No necesito tu gate
No necesito tu duda
No cargo tu weight

Have your joy but keep your spirit
Toca el fuego, keep your name
Taste the world but don’t disappear in it
Pleasure don’t have to become pain
Pasa el plato, pass forgiveness
Raise your glass and bless the air
Estamos aquí un minuto
Build the life you want while you’re here

Venimos del void
Now we turn it into gold
Oro en el pecho
Gold in the soul
Built from the pressure
Raised by the cold
Venimos del void
Now we turn it into gold

¡Oro!
But we aiming past gold!
¡Oro!
Que lo sepa todo el mundo!

Oh-oh, déjalo arder
Oh-oh, déjalo ver
Oh-oh, mírame crecer
Venimos del void
Now we turn it into gold

sections.raw: Bridge - Female Spoken Over Snare Rolls
sections.text:
Escucha.
No tienes que contestar cada alarma.
No tienes que cargar cada fantasma.
No tienes que quedarte pequeño
porque te conocieron en la oscuridad.
Some nights are for healing.
Some nights are for hands in the air.
Pero algunas noches…
algunas noches tú mismo construyes la corona.

sections.raw: Breakdown - Male Crew Call And Response
sections.text:
¿Quién te hizo?
¡La presión!
¿Quién te crió?
¡La lección!
¿Quién dudó?
¡Un montón!
¿Quién brilla?
¡El corazón!

Mind go quiet
Heart go wide
Tambor rolling
Fire inside
Mente clara
Alma alive
Este verano
We still alive

sections.raw: Final Verse - Male Rap, Victory Energy
sections.text:
I’m not just gold, soy fuego con memoria
Every loss melted down into gloria
Every no got folded in steel
Every scar turned proof I’m real
Gold can bend, gold can shine
But I want worth they can’t define
Más alto que prendas, más alto que rings
Higher than price, higher than kings
Del vacío al fuego
Del fuego al molde
Del molde al brillo
Del brillo past gold

sections.raw: Final Chorus - Full Power, Female Lead + Crew
sections.text:
Venimos del void
Now we turn it into gold
Oro en el pecho
Gold in the soul
Built from the pressure
Raised by the cold
Venimos del void
Now we turn it into gold

¡Oro!
But we aiming past gold!
¡Oro!
Que lo sepa todo el mundo!

Más alto que oro
Más alto que fear
Higher than what they said we were
Todavía aquí

Ay ya ya
Estamos afuera now
Ay ya ya
Feet on the ground
Mente clara
Heart bold
From the void
Past the gold
Venimos del void
Now we turn it into gold
